title: Performance Tuning for Node.js Quiz
description: Test your knowledge about advanced performance tuning and multi-core processing in Node.js.

questions.question: By default, how many CPU cores does a standard Node.js application use?
options: It depends on the operating system.

questions.question: Which Node.js module allows you to spawn multiple copies of your application to utilize all available CPU cores?
What is a 'Stop-the-world' event in Node.js memory management?
options: A way to encrypt files using a secret key.
When the Garbage Collector pauses the entire application's execution to clean up unused memory.
A way to automatically compress files.

questions.question: Which of these practices is recommended for getting the best performance from Google's V8 JavaScript engine?
options: Use 'delete' frequently to clear object properties.
Initialize all object properties in the same order inside the constructor.

questions.question: Which process manager is commonly used to automate Node.js 'Cluster Mode' and provide robust monitoring?
